LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. DEFENDANT SHIFTS THE BURDEN OF PRODUCING EVIDENCE ON THE ISSUE OF ACTUAL OR CONSTRUCTIVE NOTICE. PLAINTIFF PRESENTS EVIDENCE THAT RAISES A TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT ON THE ISSUE OF NOTICE. SEE PLAINTIFF'S RESPONSE TO DEFENDANTS' UNDISPUTED MATERIAL FACTS 11 AND PLAINTIFFS' ADDITIONAL FACTS 8-10. PLAINTIFFS' OBJECTION TO EVIDENCE SUBMITTED IN THE REPLY IS SUSTAINED. MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Oct-08-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is denied. Defendant shifts the burden of producing evidence on the issue of actual or constructive notice. Plaintiff presents evidence that raises a triable issue of fact on the issue of notice. See plaintiff's response to defendants' undisputed material facts 11 and plaintiffs' additional facts 8-10. Plaintiffs' objection to evidence submitted in the reply is sustained. Plaintiffs' objections to evidence in the moving papers are overruled except for 5 as to the text after the word "and." Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. (302/PJM/VC) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600
